name: node-red-contrib-unifi-ultimate
description: Node-RED nodes for Ubiquiti UniFi integrations, starting with UniFi Protect.
author: Massimo Saccani

scripts.test: node --check nodes/unifi-protect-config.js && node --check nodes/unifi-protect-device.js && node --check nodes/utils/unifi-protect-utils.js && node --check nodes/utils/unifi-protect-device-registry.js
